name: /compliance-add: pops $EDITOR for the operator's why_authoritative when no --why-authoritative-file is provided
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf '#!/bin/sh\nprintf "Authoritative.\\nWidely adopted.\\nGovernment publisher.\\n" > "$1"\n' > fake-editor.sh && chmod +x fake-editor.sh && EDITOR="$PWD/fake-editor.sh" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework --id nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" && grep -E 'Authoritative' .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E 'Government publisher' .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
